summary: All acceptance criteria are satisfied. Router.resolve returns routing_reason with source (label/assignee/default) and matched fields. Orchestrator dispatch logs include routing_reason via routing_reason_log/1 at orchestrator.ex:1483. Three dedicated tests cover label route, assignee route, and default route diagnostics. Existing routing behavior is unchanged (routing_reason is additive metadata). mix test and mix specs.check both pass cleanly.
